name: whatsapp
label: WhatsApp Desktop
description: WhatsApp Desktop data synced from a client device via Syncthing

auth.setup_guide:
Add the WhatsApp Desktop data directory as a Syncthing folder and share it with this server using the Device ID shown in Infrastructure.

On macOS, the usual path is: ~/Library/Group Containers/group.net.whatsapp.WhatsApp.shared/

When the pending folder appears in this admin panel, accept it with local path: raw_sources/whatsapp/

WhatsApp Desktop must be installed and have run at least once.
